name: Rakul C Kandavel
summary: Full-stack developer with 3+ years of experience building scalable applications using React, Node.js, TypeScript, and cloud platforms including Firebase, Supabase, and AWS. Proven track record delivering production-grade web and mobile apps with AI integrations, real-time data pipelines, and accessibility compliance.

experience.title: Lead Developer
bullets: Led full-stack development of an AI-powered social shopping platform integrating Gemini APIs for virtual try-ons and AI stylist features, driving adoption by 1,000+ active users across AWS and Firebase.
Engineered and optimized APIs on Supabase and Firebase for authentication, cloud functions, and real-time data supporting thousands of concurrent sessions.
Developed responsive interfaces with React and TypeScript ensuring WCAG accessibility compliance and high performance across iOS and Android.
Applied modular micro-architecture and Git workflows to ensure reliability and rapid deployment.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Designed a full-stack wellness app integrating Gemini, OpenAI, and Spoonacular APIs to deliver personalized chatbot recommendations for 500+ monthly active users.
Handled real-time personalization workflows with Supabase functions and applied prompt engineering and schema ingestion pipelines.
Refactored the codebase into scalable TypeScript modules and optimized state management for performance.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Built a full-stack healthcare appointment booking system with React Native front-end and Firebase APIs for real-time scheduling and secure data handling.
Platform adopted by 200+ patients and healthcare providers during pilot launch, processing hundreds of bookings without system downtime.
Delivered responsive, mobile-first UI improving patient booking engagement by 40%.

experience.title: Research Assistant
bullets: Developed LSTM-based predictive model for time-series forecasting with 92% accuracy driving actionable insights at scale.
Built a web application presenting predictive analytics with WCAG accessibility compliance for non-technical stakeholders.
